credentials.title: Enter Credentials
credentials.description: Enter your Tuya Cloud API credentials. Details in intergration readme

discover_devices.title: Discovering Devices
discover_devices.description: Please wait while we discover your devices...

update_interval.title: Update Interval
update_interval.description: How often should sensor data be updated?

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your Client ID and Client Secret. Note: If your Tuya developer trial expired, you'll need to apply for an extension and wait for it to be renewed.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Tuya API. Please check your region selection and network connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs for details.
error.no_new_devices_selected: No new devices selected. To delete devices, use the relevant device's 3-dot menu and choose Delete.

abort.discovery_failed: Failed to discover devices. Error: {error}. Please check your credentials, region selection, and ensure your Tuya developer trial is active.
abort.no_devices: No devices found. Please ensure your Tuya account has devices associated with these API credentials.
abort.wrong_datacenter: Device discovery failed because the selected region appears incorrect for this Tuya project. Try another datacenter/region.
abort.subscription_expired: Device discovery failed because your Tuya IoT Core subscription may be expired or missing permissions.
abort.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please verify your Tuya API credentials.

error.no_new_devices_selected: No new devices selected. To delete devices, use the relevant device's 3-dot menu and choose Delete.
error.invalid_selection: Please choose a valid settings action.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred while opening integration settings.

abort.discovery_failed: Failed to discover devices. Please check credentials, region selection, and subscription state.
abort.no_devices: No devices found for these credentials.
abort.wrong_datacenter: Device discovery failed because the selected region appears incorrect for this Tuya project.
abort.subscription_expired: Device discovery failed because your Tuya IoT Core subscription may be expired or missing permissions.
abort.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please verify your Tuya API credentials.

api_auth_failed.title: Tuya API authentication failure
api_auth_failed.description: Tuya Unsupported Sensors could not authenticate with Tuya Cloud for this config entry. Verify your API credentials and region in integration settings. Latest error: {error}

discovery_failed_datacenter_or_subscript.title: Tuya discovery failed (datacenter or subscription)
